pois.title: Samaria Gorge

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Taking a hike through this stunning gorge is a must-do while you're in Crete.

pois.title: Visit the Old Town

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Situated in the heart of Rethymnon, the charming Old Town is filled with rich history and impressive architecture that entwines influences of the Turkish period with the Venetian-renaissance style.

pois.title: A very Venetian harbour

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: After a visit to the Venetian harbour in Rethymnon, you’ll be fooled into thinking you’d just been to Venice itself.

pois.title: Adelianos Kampos Beach

location.description: Adelianos Kampos - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This sand-and-shingle stunner stretches right along the Cretian coast from Adelianos Kampos to Rethymnon.

pois.title: Ancient Aptera & Theatre

location.description: Kalyves, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Ancient Aptera’s theatre is a semi-circle of historic treasure.

pois.title: Ancient Olive Tree

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: One of the oldest olive trees in the world – and a protected natural monument – is about 15 minutes from Kolymbari.

pois.title: Aqua Creta Limnoupolis Water Park

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Rides and slides for the whole family?

pois.title: Archaeological Museum

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Opened in 1991, this modest museum features many ancient Minoan artefacts.

pois.title: Archaeological Museum

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Culture seekers: get ready for a trip back in time!

pois.title: Baja Beach Club

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: The pristine beaches of Baja Beach Club is a 150 metre stretch of pure beach-bliss.

pois.title: Balos Beach

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Brilliant Balos Beach looks like it was plucked straight from a postcard.

pois.title: Beach bars

location.description: Stalos, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: There are a few casual, characterful bars in Stalos.

pois.title: Botanical Park & Gardens of Crete

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Get in touch with nature.

pois.title: Byzantine Walls of Chania

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: To protect the city against raids, Chania’s Byzantine walls were created.

pois.title: Cave Nerospilia

location.description: Aghia Marina - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: The Cave of Nerospilia – or "Water Cave" – is home to a set of marvellous stalactites and stalagmites.

pois.title: Elafonisi Lagoon

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: In the south-west of the island, you’ll spy the candy floss-pinks of Elafonisi Lagoon.

pois.title: Falassarna Beach

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Enjoy journeying through olive groves to reach this out-of-town shorefront.

pois.title: Fine Cretan cuisine

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: The choices of eateries in Rethymnon is vast.

pois.title: Gonia Monastery

location.description: Kolymbari, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This impressive monastery looks traditional, with a humble exterior but grand domes as well.

pois.title: Great Old Town bars

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: It may not be as buzzing as Malia, but Rethymnon town has a lot to offer when it comes to a great night out.

pois.title: Greek National Football Museum

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Here’s one for you footy fans.

pois.title: Historical and Folklore Museum

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: The museum is housed in a restored Venetian building, one of the last to be built during the Venetian period in Crete.

pois.title: Intzedin Fort

location.description: Kalyves, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This sandy-coloured building was once a prison and has had an interesting past.

pois.title: Kalyves Beach

location.description: Kalyves, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: If you’re staying in cool Kalyves, you’ll have a nice, spacious stretch of soft sand to call yours.

pois.title: Kastelli

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This district of Chania is also famed for its natural fortress and old walls, which surrounded the area from the Hellenistic period onwards.

pois.title: Kolymbari Beach

location.description: Kolymbari, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This long, pebbly beach is a winner for relaxation.

pois.title: Koum Kapi Beach

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: To the east of Chania’s old town walls, you’ll find Koum Kapi Beach.

pois.title: Maritime Museum of Crete

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Back in 1973, the Maritime Museum of Crete opened its doors.

pois.title: Municipal Gallery of Kanakakis

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Founded in 1992, the Municipal Gallery is housed in a beautiful Venetian building, below the Archaeological Museum.

pois.title: Nea Chora Beach

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: About a 15-minute walk from the old harbour, Nea Chora Beach is a pretty mix of rocks and sand, taking up about a kilometre of Chania’s shore.

pois.title: Olive Museum

location.description: Kolymbari, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Sink your teeth into local history.

pois.title: Orthi Ammos Beach

location.description: Frangokastello, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Just east of Frangokastello, you’ll stumble upon Orthi Ammos beach, famous for its soft dunes and clear shallows.

pois.title: Preveli Beach

location.description: Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Not only is Preveli a snapshot of beach paradise, it’s in a cracking location too.

pois.title: Restaurants

location.description: Adelianos Kampos - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Taste authentic Greece at one of Adelianos Kampos’ traditional tavernas.

pois.title: Rethymnon Beach

location.description: Rethymnon - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Across golden sands as far as the eye can see, the popular Rethymnon beach offers up calm and shallow waters that are ideal for swimming and snorkelling, whilst enjoying a cool refreshing break from the summer sunshine.

pois.title: Rethymnon Harbour

location.description: Adelianos Kampos - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This lovely harbour is peppered with restaurants dishing up local delicacies.

pois.title: River Tavronitis

location.description: Kolymbari, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Connecting to the pebbly beach, you’ll be able to wander around the river with ease.

pois.title: Stalos Beach

location.description: Stalos, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Beige, burnt-biscuit-coloured sands form Stalos Beach.

pois.title: Theodorou Island

location.description: Aghia Marina - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This island and nature reserve is a thing of beauty.

pois.title: Tholos Tomb of Maleme

location.description: Kolymbari, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Chania’s got quite a few nods to the Minoans, and this temple adds to the list.

pois.title: Tzagas Watersports

location.description: Adelianos Kampos - Chania, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: If you’re looking for an adrenaline-fuelled activity, head down to Tzagas Watersports located inbetween Adelianos Kampos and Platanes Beach.

pois.title: Venetian Harbour

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: The clue’s in the name – this gorgeous Greek harbour was built by the Venetians, and the history books reckon in the 1300s.

pois.title: Venetian Lighthouse

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: This is the jewel in Chania’s Venetian Harbour crown, and has been since it was built by the Venetians in the late 1500s.

pois.title: Venizelos Tombs

location.description: Chania Town, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Two politicians – father and son – rest in these tombs, placed just outside the city.

pois.title: Visit Souda Port

location.description: Kalyves, Crete Chania Area, Greece

pois.summary: Souda Port is one of Crete’s naval docks.
